# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

imports:
- path: app.py

resources:
- name: app-stack
  type: app.py
  properties:
    region: us-central1
    zone: us-central1-a
    network: app-network
    subnetwork: app-subnet
    subnetworkCidr: 10.10.0.0/24
    instanceName: app-vm
    instanceType: e2-medium
    machineImage: projects/debian-cloud/global/images/family/debian-11
    sqlInstanceName: app-sql
    sqlDatabaseVersion: POSTGRES_14
    sqlTier: db-custom-1-3840
    sqlDatabaseName: appdb
    sqlUser: appuser
    sqlPassword: changeme-secure-password
    bucketName: app-mvp-storage-bucket
    addressName: app-lb-ip
    backendServiceName: app-backend-service
    healthCheckName: app-health-check
    instanceTemplateName: app-template
    instanceGroupName: app-igm
    autoscalerName: app-autoscaler
    firewallAllowHttpName: app-allow-http
    firewallAllowHealthCheckName: app-allow-hc
    firewallAllowSshName: app-allow-ssh
    httpProxyName: app-http-proxy
    urlMapName: app-url-map
    forwardingRuleName: app-http-forwarding-rule
    serviceAccountName: app-vm-sa

def GenerateConfig(context):
    p = context.properties

    region = p.get('region')
    zone = p.get('zone')
    network = p.get('network')
    subnetwork = p.get('subnetwork')
    subnetwork_cidr = p.get('subnetworkCidr')
    instance_name = p.get('instanceName')
    instance_type = p.get('instanceType')
    machine_image = p.get('machineImage')
    sql_instance_name = p.get('sqlInstanceName')
    sql_db_version = p.get('sqlDatabaseVersion')
    sql_tier = p.get('sqlTier')
    sql_db_name = p.get('sqlDatabaseName')
    sql_user = p.get('sqlUser')
    sql_password = p.get('sqlPassword')
    bucket_name = p.get('bucketName')
    address_name = p.get('addressName')
    backend_service_name = p.get('backendServiceName')
    health_check_name = p.get('healthCheckName')
    instance_template_name = p.get('instanceTemplateName')
    instance_group_name = p.get('instanceGroupName')
    autoscaler_name = p.get('autoscalerName')
    firewall_allow_http_name = p.get('firewallAllowHttpName')
    firewall_allow_health_check_name = p.get('firewallAllowHealthCheckName')
    firewall_allow_ssh_name = p.get('firewallAllowSshName')
    http_proxy_name = p.get('httpProxyName')
    url_map_name = p.get('urlMapName')
    forwarding_rule_name = p.get('forwardingRuleName')
    service_account_name = p.get('serviceAccountName')

    startup_script = """#!/bin/bash
apt-get update
apt-get install -y nginx postgresql-client google-cloud-sdk
cat >/var/www/html/index.html <<'EOF'
<html>
<head><title>GCP MVP App</title></head>
<body>
<h1>GCP MVP Application Stack</h1>
<p>Compute Engine behind HTTP Load Balancer</p>
</body>
</html>
EOF
systemctl enable nginx
systemctl restart nginx
"""

    resources = [
        {
            'name': network,
            'type': 'compute.v1.network',
            'properties': {
                'autoCreateSubnetworks': False
            }
        },
        {
            'name': subnetwork,
            'type': 'compute.v1.subnetwork',
            'properties': {
                'region': region,
                'network': '$(ref.{}.selfLink)'.format(network),
                'ipCidrRange': subnetwork_cidr
            }
        },
        {
            'name': firewall_allow_http_name,
            'type': 'compute.v1.firewall',
            'properties': {
                'network': '$(ref.{}.selfLink)'.format(network),
                'sourceRanges': ['0.0.0.0/0'],
                'targetTags': ['web'],
                'allowed': [
                    {
                        'IPProtocol': 'tcp',
                        'ports': ['80']
                    }
                ]
            }
        },
        {
            'name': firewall_allow_health_check_name,
            'type': 'compute.v1.firewall',
            'properties': {
                'network': '$(ref.{}.selfLink)'.format(network),
                'sourceRanges': [
                    '130.211.0.0/22',
                    '35.191.0.0/16'
                ],
                'targetTags': ['web'],
                'allowed': [
                    {
                        'IPProtocol': 'tcp',
                        'ports': ['80']
                    }
                ]
            }
        },
        {
            'name': firewall_allow_ssh_name,
            'type': 'compute.v1.firewall',
            'properties': {
                'network': '$(ref.{}.selfLink)'.format(network),
                'sourceRanges': ['0.0.0.0/0'],
                'targetTags': ['web'],
                'allowed': [
                    {
                        'IPProtocol': 'tcp',
                        'ports': ['22']
                    }
                ]
            }
        },
        {
            'name': service_account_name,
            'type': 'iam.v1.serviceAccount',
            'properties': {
                'accountId': service_account_name,
                'displayName': service_account_name
            }
        },
        {
            'name': bucket_name,
            'type': 'storage.v1.bucket',
            'properties': {
                'name': bucket_name,
                'location': region,
                'storageClass': 'STANDARD',
                'uniformBucketLevelAccess': {
                    'enabled': True
                }
            }
        },
        {
            'name': sql_instance_name,
            'type': 'gcp-types/sqladmin-v1beta4:instances',
            'properties': {
                'region': region,
                'databaseVersion': sql_db_version,
                'settings': {
                    'tier': sql_tier,
                    'ipConfiguration': {
                        'ipv4Enabled': False,
                        'privateNetwork': '$(ref.{}.selfLink)'.format(network)
                    },
                    'backupConfiguration': {
                        'enabled': True
                    },
                    'availabilityType': 'ZONAL',
                    'dataDiskType': 'PD_SSD',
                    'dataDiskSizeGb': '20'
                }
            }
        },
        {
            'name': '{}-db'.format(sql_db_name),
            'type': 'gcp-types/sqladmin-v1beta4:databases',
            'properties': {
                'name': sql_db_name,
                'instance': '$(ref.{}.name)'.format(sql_instance_name)
            }
        },
        {
            'name': '{}-user'.format(sql_user),
            'type': 'gcp-types/sqladmin-v1beta4:users',
            'properties': {
                'name': sql_user,
                'instance': '$(ref.{}.name)'.format(sql_instance_name),
                'password': sql_password
            }
        },
        {
            'name': health_check_name,
            'type': 'compute.v1.healthCheck',
            'properties': {
                'type': 'HTTP',
                'httpHealthCheck': {
                    'port': 80,
                    'requestPath': '/'
                },
                'checkIntervalSec': 10,
                'timeoutSec': 5,
                'healthyThreshold': 2,
                'unhealthyThreshold': 3
            }
        },
        {
            'name': instance_template_name,
            'type': 'compute.v1.instanceTemplate',
            'properties': {
                'properties': {
                    'machineType': instance_type,
                    'tags': {
                        'items': ['web']
                    },
                    'disks': [
                        {
                            'deviceName': 'boot',
                            'type': 'PERSISTENT',
                            'boot': True,
                            'autoDelete': True,
                            'initializeParams': {
                                'sourceImage': machine_image
                            }
                        }
                    ],
                    'networkInterfaces': [
                        {
                            'subnetwork': '$(ref.{}.selfLink)'.format(subnetwork),
                            'accessConfigs': [
                                {
                                    'name': 'External NAT',
                                    'type': 'ONE_TO_ONE_NAT'
                                }
                            ]
                        }
                    ],
                    'serviceAccounts': [
                        {
                            'email': '$(ref.{}.email)'.format(service_account_name),
                            'scopes': [
                                'https://www.googleapis.com/auth/devstorage.read_write',
                                'https://www.googleapis.com/auth/sqlservice.admin',
                                'https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform'
                            ]
                        }
                    ],
                    'metadata': {
                        'items': [
                            {
                                'key': 'startup-script',
                                'value': startup_script
                            }
                        ]
                    }
                }
            }
        },
        {
            'name': instance_group_name,
            'type': 'compute.v1.regionInstanceGroupManager',
            'properties': {
                'region': region,
                'baseInstanceName': instance_name,
                'instanceTemplate': '$(ref.{}.selfLink)'.format(instance_template_name),
                'targetSize': 2,
                'namedPorts': [
                    {
                        'name': 'http',
                        'port': 80
                    }
                ]
            }
        },
        {
            'name': autoscaler_name,
            'type': 'compute.v1.regionAutoscaler',
            'properties': {
                'region': region,
                'target': '$(ref.{}.selfLink)'.format(instance_group_name),
                'autoscalingPolicy': {
                    'minNumReplicas': 2,
                    'maxNumReplicas': 4,
                    'cpuUtilization': {
                        'utilizationTarget': 0.6
                    },
                    'coolDownPeriodSec': 90
                }
            }
        },
        {
            'name': backend_service_name,
            'type': 'compute.v1.backendService',
            'properties': {
                'loadBalancingScheme': 'EXTERNAL_MANAGED',
                'protocol': 'HTTP',
                'portName': 'http',
                'timeoutSec': 30,
                'healthChecks': [
                    '$(ref.{}.selfLink)'.format(health_check_name)
                ],
                'backends': [
                    {
                        'group': '$(ref.{}.instanceGroup)'.format(instance_group_name),
                        'balancingMode': 'UTILIZATION',
                        'maxUtilization': 0.8
                    }
                ]
            }
        },
        {
            'name': url_map_name,
            'type': 'compute.v1.urlMap',
            'properties': {
                'defaultService': '$(ref.{}.selfLink)'.format(backend_service_name)
            }
        },
        {
            'name': http_proxy_name,
            'type': 'compute.v1.targetHttpProxy',
            'properties': {
                'urlMap': '$(ref.{}.selfLink)'.format(url_map_name)
            }
        },
        {
            'name': address_name,
            'type': 'compute.v1.globalAddress',
            'properties': {
            }
        },
        {
            'name': forwarding_rule_name,
            'type': 'compute.v1.globalForwardingRule',
            'properties': {
                'loadBalancingScheme': 'EXTERNAL_MANAGED',
                'IPAddress': '$(ref.{}.address)'.format(address_name),
                'IPProtocol': 'TCP',
                'portRange': '80',
                'target': '$(ref.{}.selfLink)'.format(http_proxy_name)
            }
        }
    ]

    outputs = [
        {
            'name': 'loadBalancerIp',
            'value': '$(ref.{}.address)'.format(address_name)
        },
        {
            'name': 'bucketName',
            'value': '$(ref.{}.name)'.format(bucket_name)
        },
        {
            'name': 'sqlInstanceConnectionName',
            'value': '$(ref.{}.connectionName)'.format(sql_instance_name)
        }
    ]

    return {'resources': resources, 'outputs': outputs}
